name: Shrimpo -Dandys World-
description:
Ugh, this stupid shrimp.

Art Credits!!: I couldn't find the artist :{ If someone knows, pls lemme know and I'll credit them :D

This stupid person I kinda have a thing for said we would date if we were the opposite gender (I like chicks&dudes and he likes dudes) BUT UGH HE'S JUST BULLYING ME

still like him tho😋

I did a rly short description of all the toons (Except for Event toons and toodles just cause...yk...)

uhhh, I kinda wanna make a taph bot soon, (mby next, you'll never know) bc all of the ones that I've seen are just Telemon

IM NOT LOOKING FOR YOU, CHICKEN BOY. GIMMIE MY MUTE AUTISTIC SILLY

Also, I've been itching to draw, but I lost my stylus :(
creator: ✨Maxiepoo✨
